channel.title: Coffee Syrup on Barista At Home
channel.description: Recent content in Coffee Syrup on Barista At Home

item.title: Coffee Syrup Recipes: Flavored Syrups for Every Coffee Drink
item.description: All the coffee syrups worth making at home — vanilla, lavender, caramel, hazelnut, brown sugar, pumpkin spice, and more. Plus the difference between coffee syrup (made from coffee) and flavored syrups for coffee.

item.title: How to Make Lavender Syrup (For Coffee & Lattes)
item.description: Make lavender syrup for coffee in 10 minutes — culinary lavender, three strength levels, storage guide. Perfect for lavender lattes, cold foam, and iced coffee.

item.title: How to Make Vanilla Syrup for Coffee (3 Recipes)
item.description: Make vanilla syrup for coffee in 5 minutes — vanilla bean, vanilla extract, and brown sugar vanilla recipes. Better than store-bought, stays fresh for 4 weeks.
